{"obj_description": "New objective function focuses on minimizing passenger waiting time, taxi travel time, and balancing assignments with adjusted weights. This approach prioritizes timely service while considering taxi routing and load balance.","obj_code": "def dynamic_obj_func(self):
    print("Creating dynamic objectives for Assignment Model")
    # Custom cost components
    cost1 = gb.quicksum( self.y[v,p] * (self.distMatrix[self.taxi[v].start_pos][self.passenger[p].origin] + self.distMatrix[self.passenger[p].origin][self.passenger[p].destination]) for v in self.taxi.keys() for p in self.passenger.keys() )
    cost2 = gb.quicksum( self.y[v,p] * max(self.taxi[v].arrival_time - self.passenger[p].arrTime, 0) for v in self.taxi.keys() for p in self.passenger.keys() )
    cost3 = gb.quicksum( (gb.quicksum(self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys())) * (gb.quicksum(self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys())) for v in self.taxi.keys() )
    # Custom weights
    weights = [10, 20, 1000] 
    # Build objective expression
    objective = sum(w*c for w,c in zip(weights, [cost1, cost2, cost3]))
    self.model.setObjective(objective, gb.GRB.MINIMIZE)"}

    "obj_code": "    def dynamic_obj_func(self):
        print("Creating dynamic objectives for Assignment Model")
        # Waiting time cost: Taxi arrival time - passenger request time, only if taxi is later
        cost1 = gb.quicksum(gb.quicksum( max(self.taxi[v].arrival_time - self.passenger[p].arrTime, 0) * self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys()) for v in self.taxi.keys())
        
        # Detour cost: Difference between taxi to destination and taxi to origin times
        cost2 = gb.quicksum(gb.quicksum( (self.distMatrix[self.passenger[p].destination][self.taxi[v].start_pos] - self.distMatrix[self.passenger[p].origin][self.taxi[v].start_pos]) * self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys()) for v in self.taxi.keys())
        
        # Passenger-distance cost: Sum of origin-to-destination travel times
        cost3 = gb.quicksum(gb.quicksum( self.distMatrix[self.passenger[p].origin][self.passenger[p].destination] * self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys()) for v in self.taxi.keys())
        
        # Quadratic assignment penalty: Discourage multiple assignments per taxi
        cost4 = gb.quicksum( (gb.quicksum(self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys())) * (gb.quicksum(self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys())) for v in self.taxi.keys()) 
        
        costs = [cost1, cost2, cost3, cost4]
        weights = [15, 10, 5, 10000] 
        objective = sum(w * c for w, c in zip(weights, costs))
        self.model.setObjective(objective, gb.GRB.MINIMIZE)"

    "obj_code": "    def dynamic_obj_func(self):
        print("Creating dynamic objectives for Assignment Model")
        # Waiting time cost: Taxi arrival time - passenger request time, only if taxi is later
        cost1 = gb.quicksum(gb.quicksum( max(self.taxi[v].arrival_time - self.passenger[p].arrTime, 0) * self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys()) for v in self.taxi.keys())
        
        # Detour cost: Difference between taxi to destination and taxi to origin times
        cost2 = gb.quicksum(gb.quicksum( (self.distMatrix[self.passenger[p].destination][self.taxi[v].start_pos] - self.distMatrix[self.passenger[p].origin][self.taxi[v].start_pos]) * self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys()) for v in self.taxi.keys())
        
        # Passenger-distance cost: Sum of origin-to-destination travel times
        cost3 = gb.quicksum(gb.quicksum( self.distMatrix[self.passenger[p].origin][self.passenger[p].destination] * self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys()) for v in self.taxi.keys())
        
        # Quadratic assignment penalty: Discourage multiple assignments per taxi
        cost4 = gb.quicksum( (gb.quicksum(self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys())) * (gb.quicksum(self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys())) for v in self.taxi.keys()) 
        
        costs = [cost1, cost2, cost3, cost4]
        weights = [15, 10, 5, 10000] 
        objective = sum(w * c for w, c in zip(weights, costs))
        self.model.setObjective(objective, gb.GRB.MINIMIZE)"

    "obj_code": "    def dynamic_obj_func(self):
        print("Creating dynamic objectives for Assignment Model")
        # Waiting time cost: Taxi arrival time - passenger request time, only if taxi is later
        cost1 = gb.quicksum(gb.quicksum( max(self.taxi[v].arrival_time - self.passenger[p].arrTime, 0) * self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys()) for v in self.taxi.keys())
        
        # Detour cost: Difference between taxi to destination and taxi to origin times
        cost2 = gb.quicksum(gb.quicksum( (self.distMatrix[self.passenger[p].destination][self.taxi[v].start_pos] - self.distMatrix[self.passenger[p].origin][self.taxi[v].start_pos]) * self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys()) for v in self.taxi.keys())
        
        # Passenger-distance cost: Sum of origin-to-destination travel times
        cost3 = gb.quicksum(gb.quicksum( self.distMatrix[self.passenger[p].origin][self.passenger[p].destination] * self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys()) for v in self.taxi.keys())
        
        # Quadratic assignment penalty: Discourage multiple assignments per taxi
        cost4 = gb.quicksum( (gb.quicksum(self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys())) * (gb.quicksum(self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys())) for v in self.taxi.keys()) 
        
        costs = [cost1, cost2, cost3, cost4]
        weights = [15, 10, 5, 10000] 
        objective = sum(w * c for w, c in zip(weights, costs))
        self.model.setObjective(objective, gb.GRB.MINIMIZE)"

{
    "obj_description": "This objective optimizes taxi assignment by minimizing the total passenger waiting time while penalizing long detours. It ensures timely service and balances assignment efficiency with sequencing feasibility.",
    "obj_code": "    def dynamic_obj_func(self):
        print("Creating dynamic objectives for Assignment Model")
        # Waiting time cost: Taxi arrival time - passenger request time, only if taxi is later
        cost1 = gb.quicksum(gb.quicksum( max(self.taxi[v].arrival_time - self.passenger[p].arrTime, 0) * self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys()) for v in self.taxi.keys())
        
        # Detour cost: Difference between taxi to destination and taxi to origin times
        cost2 = gb.quicksum(gb.quicksum( (self.distMatrix[self.passenger[p].destination][self.taxi[v].start_pos] - self.distMatrix[self.passenger[p].origin][self.taxi[v].start_pos]) * self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys()) for v in self.taxi.keys())
        
        # Passenger-distance cost: Sum of origin-to-destination travel times
        cost3 = gb.quicksum(gb.quicksum( self.distMatrix[self.passenger[p].origin][self.passenger[p].destination] * self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys()) for v in self.taxi.keys())
        
        # Quadratic assignment penalty: Discourage multiple assignments per taxi
        cost4 = gb.quicksum( (gb.quicksum(self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys())) * (gb.quicksum(self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys())) for v in self.taxi.keys()) 
        
        costs = [cost1, cost2, cost3, cost4]
        weights = [15, 10, 5, 10000] 
        objective = sum(w * c for w, c in zip(weights, costs))
        self.model.setObjective(objective, gb.GRB.MINIMIZE)"
}

{"obj_description": "New objective function focuses on minimizing passenger waiting time, taxi travel time, and balancing assignments with adjusted weights. This approach prioritizes timely service while considering taxi routing and load balance.","obj_code": "def dynamic_obj_func(self):
    print("Creating dynamic objectives for Assignment Model")
    # Custom cost components
    cost1 = gb.quicksum( self.y[v,p] * (self.distMatrix[self.taxi[v].start_pos][self.passenger[p].origin] + self.distMatrix[self.passenger[p].origin][self.passenger[p].destination]) for v in self.taxi.keys() for p in self.passenger.keys() )
    cost2 = gb.quicksum( self.y[v,p] * max(self.taxi[v].arrival_time - self.passenger[p].arrTime, 0) for v in self.taxi.keys() for p in self.passenger.keys() )
    cost3 = gb.quicksum( (gb.quicksum(self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys())) * (gb.quicksum(self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys())) for v in self.taxi.keys() )
    # Custom weights
    weights = [10, 20, 1000] 
    # Build objective expression
    objective = sum(w*c for w,c in zip(weights, [cost1, cost2, cost3]))
    self.model.setObjective(objective, gb.GRB.MINIMIZE)"}

        cost1 = gb.quicksum(gb.quicksum( max(self.taxi[v].arrival_time - self.passenger[p].arrTime, 0) * self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys()) for v in self.taxi.keys())
        
        # Detour cost: Difference between taxi to destination and taxi to origin times
        cost2 = gb.quicksum(gb.quicksum( (self.distMatrix[self.passenger[p].destination][self.taxi[v].start_pos] - self.distMatrix[self.passenger[p].origin][self.taxi[v].start_pos]) * self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys()) for v in self.taxi.keys())
        
        # Passenger-distance cost: Sum of origin-to-destination travel times
        cost3 = gb.quicksum(gb.quicksum( self.distMatrix[self.passenger[p].origin][self.passenger[p].destination] * self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys()) for v in self.taxi.keys())
        
        # Quadratic assignment penalty: Discourage multiple assignments per taxi
        cost4 = gb.quicksum( (gb.quicksum(self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys())) * (gb.quicksum(self.y[v,p] for p in self.passenger.keys())) for v in self.taxi.keys()) 
        
        costs = [cost1, cost2, cost3, cost4]
        weights = [15, 10, 5, 10000] 
        objective = sum(w * c for w, c in zip(weights, costs))
        self.model.setObjective(objective, gb.GRB.MINIMIZE)"
